name: OpenRouter
description: Access 300+ AI models from multiple providers through a single OpenAI-compatible API

defaultModel.description: Default model in provider/model format (e.g. anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-20250514, google/gemini-2.0-flash)

siteUrl.description: Your site URL sent via HTTP-Referer header for rankings attribution

appName.description: Your app name sent via X-Title header for rankings attribution

fallbackModels.description: Ordered list of fallback models if the primary is unavailable
